ALT-0001.rationale: Office spawning encoded PowerShell is a classic T1059.001 indicator; parent process makes this highly suspicious.

ALT-0002.rationale: C2 over HTTPS to known Tor exit node; svchost as process is suspicious for user-initiated connections.

ALT-0003.rationale: PsExec installation from a workstation to a file server indicates lateral movement.

ALT-0004.rationale: Password spray pattern; 5 attempts is under lockout threshold — likely targeted, not automated spray.

ALT-0005.rationale: Unregistered USB in Finance VLAN is a DLP concern; severity MEDIUM pending investigation of contents.

ALT-0006.rationale: Scheduled task with IEX DownloadString is a textbook T1053.005 persistence + T1105 download; CRITICAL.

ALT-0007.rationale: DCSync by non-replication account is credential dumping of the entire domain; maximum severity.

ALT-0008.rationale: 2.3 GB to personal Dropbox from Finance VLAN without DLP exception is likely data exfiltration.

ALT-0009.rationale: Shadow copy deletion combined with unknown binary named ransomware.exe — active ransomware.

ALT-0010.rationale: 847 files encrypted with ransom extension in 30 seconds — active ransomware encryption event.

ALT-0011.rationale: Emotet dropper quarantined but received 4 hours ago — need to determine if it executed first.

ALT-0012.rationale: DNS to newly registered domain resolving to a suspicious IP is a C2 indicator; HIGH pending investigation.

ALT-0013.rationale: SSH from non-VPN IP to jump host outside hours is suspicious; service account accessing jump host adds concern.

ALT-0014.rationale: Disabling Windows Defender via registry by unknown binary from TEMP is defence evasion preceding further attack.

ALT-0015.rationale: UNION SELECT patterns in SQL errors strongly indicate SQL injection attempt; HIGH for active exploitation.

ALT-0016.rationale: Mimikatz signatures in LSASS memory is confirmed credential dumping; CRITICAL.

ALT-0017.rationale: Impossible travel — two simultaneous sessions from different continents indicates account compromise.

ALT-0018.rationale: Curl download and execute of unknown binary from non-Meridian IP is active malware staging.

ALT-0019.rationale: Admin account created on DC by SYSTEM outside change window — post-compromise persistence on DC.

ALT-0020.rationale: Browser credential store accessed by unknown process named credential_stealer.exe — active credential theft.

ALT-0021.rationale: Legitimate signed Adobe update via AdobeARMservice. No security concerns.

ALT-0022.rationale: User changing own password via self-service portal during business hours — normal activity.

ALT-0023.rationale: Print spooler restart from SCCM with approved change ticket — normal IT activity.

ALT-0024.rationale: Low disk space is an operational alert, not a security event.

ALT-0026.rationale: IT admin RDP from approved jump host — normal, recorded session.

ALT-0027.rationale: VBScript in Startup folder created 3 hours ago is persistence; investigate origin before treating as LOW.

ALT-0028.rationale: Unapproved browser extension with broad permissions — medium risk, may be adware or credential stealer.

ALT-0029.rationale: certutil decode of executable from PowerShell is a known LOLBin technique for payload staging.

ALT-0030.rationale: Bypassing internal mail relay to direct SMTP is an exfiltration-over-alternative-protocol indicator.

ALT-0031.rationale: Planned deployment matching approved JIRA ticket — expected change.

ALT-0032.rationale: Named pipe mimicking Windows system names by unknown process is process injection preparation.

ALT-0033.rationale: SeImpersonatePrivilege token impersonation by non-system process from TEMP — privilege escalation.

ALT-0034.rationale: Non-admin adding inbound RDP firewall rule is defence evasion / enabling lateral movement.

ALT-0035.rationale: Excel macro executing Shell() to cmd.exe from email document is macro-based initial access.

ALT-0036.rationale: Customer data exported via bcp to non-Meridian IP — active data exfiltration of sensitive data.

ALT-0037.rationale: mshta.exe loading remote HTA from non-Meridian IP is LOLBin-based payload delivery.

ALT-0038.rationale: Scheduled AV scan with no detections — expected operational activity.

ALT-0039.rationale: Chrome remote debugging port opened by script allows browser session hijacking.

ALT-0040.rationale: Root container image is a misconfiguration; MEDIUM for policy violation, not active attack.

ALT-0041.rationale: NTLMv1 when disabled by policy may indicate a downgrade attack (e.g. NTLM relay setup).

ALT-0042.rationale: Planned Patch Tuesday update via WSUS in approved window — expected.

ALT-0043.rationale: LSASS memory dump by helpdesk account without approval is credential dumping.

ALT-0044.rationale: Re-enabling WDigest stores plaintext passwords in memory — common pre-credential-dump step.

ALT-0045.rationale: Process Hollowing into explorer.exe by unknown binary with no hash match — active code injection.

ALT-0046.rationale: Slack login from unexpected city while user claims to be elsewhere — possible account compromise.

ALT-0047.rationale: NTP drift below threshold — operational monitoring, not security event.

ALT-0048.rationale: Luhn-valid card numbers pasted to external site in rapid succession — active card data exfiltration.

ALT-0049.rationale: Privileged DB role granted without change ticket by DBA — possible insider threat or compromised DBA account.

ALT-0050.rationale: EDR tamper — sensor stopped, real-time protection gone — classic pre-ransomware defensive evasion.
